programs.title: Redemption Run
programs.desc: As the World Championships are about to start, one of the strongest pushers on the men's team sustains an injury and the pressure is mounting on the Women's team as the window for success narrows.

programs.title: Why Plastic?
programs.desc: An examination of why we rely on plastics.

programs.title: The Nature of Things
programs.sub_title: Lost World of the Hanging Gardens
programs.desc: ISIS destroys thousands of ancient artifacts and buildings in Mosul; archaeologists are making incredible discoveries in the wreckage.

programs.title: Rising Through the Fray
programs.desc: Indigenous Rising skates to claim their space on the roller derby track as the first borderless team in the sport.
